hero.headline: We build for what comes next.
hero.subhead: A B2B technology consultancy steering clients through the next generation of software, security, and Agentic AI — bridging the gap between business and technology, not standing between them.

pullQuote.text: Most of our work is repeat business. Almost all of it ships to production.

narrative.title: A B2B technology consultancy with delivery in five countries.
paragraphs: Vergent Technology Solutions Ltd. helps clients leverage new technologies to competitive advantage and supports them through software development, cloud transformation, security, and Agentic AI work.

Our capabilities are uniquely distinguished by where we deliver from. With teams across Kenya, the UAE, Kyrgyzstan, the Philippines, and India, we run continuous engagements with senior people in your time zone — not handoff queues across vendors.

expertise.title: Comprehensive expertise across the platforms enterprises rely on.
expertise.intro: From legacy ERP migrations to agentic systems running in production — six places where most of our work concentrates.

items.title: Microsoft cloud and Dynamics
items.body: Azure landing zones, Office 365 governance, and Dynamics 365 implementations that align to how your business actually runs.

items.title: Oracle licence rationalisation
items.body: Strategic license management for Oracle environments — fewer surprises at audit time, lower spend the rest of the year.

items.title: SAP modernisation
items.body: Transition to SAP S/4HANA cloud with a delivery plan that respects the integrations holding your operations together.

items.title: AWS optimisation
items.body: Tailor AWS usage for performance and cost efficiency. Reserved instances, right-sizing, and the unglamorous bits that move the bill.

items.title: Software licensing assessment
items.body: Maximise the value of your software licenses while ensuring compliance — across Microsoft, Oracle, SAP, and the long tail.

items.title: Agentic AI in production
items.body: Design, build, and operate the agents that increasingly run alongside enterprise systems — with evals, observability, and governance built in.

approach.title: Embedded delivery, accountable to outcomes.
approach.intro: Six disciplines that define how Vergent shows up — across every practice and every engagement shape.

disciplines.title: Reference architecture
disciplines.summary: End-to-end designs across cloud, security, data, and agentic systems — frameworks-aligned and audit-ready.

disciplines.title: Production & eval engineering
disciplines.summary: CI/CD, observability, and the eval suites that keep platforms — and the agents on top of them — reliable in production.

disciplines.title: Cyber AIOps & SOC
disciplines.summary: AI-driven detection, response, and continuous control monitoring across hybrid and multi-cloud estates.

disciplines.title: Licence & cloud cost rationalisation
disciplines.summary: IT licence audits and cloud-spend reviews that reclaim budget and surface contract risk before renewal.

disciplines.title: Delivery & vendor management
disciplines.summary: A single accountable owner across SIs, internal teams, and external partners — through go-live and beyond.

disciplines.title: Sourcing & contracts
disciplines.summary: Supplier selection and negotiation — leverage on your side of the table.
